problem id: 654e8a98
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10101001 -> 01011101
  10111000 -> 11010111
  11000101 -> 00111110
  01100101 -> 00101111
  10111110 -> 11110111
  11010011 -> 10011110
  01110011 -> 10011111
  10110001 -> 10011111

query: 00100001
predicted answer: 00001101
